mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, del_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM test_data WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, title, content, del_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM test_data WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_data (title, content, del_yn, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, 'N', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE test_data SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.delete: UPDATE test_data SET del_yn = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
